title: Software Developer
description: Nortek Consulting Inc. has openings for Software Developers for Irving, TX & various unanticipated sites throughout the US.
duties: Research, design, develop, implement, test, and support applications in complex software solutions as per business requirements.
Perform requirements gathering. Code, debug, Deploy, and resolve production issues.
Use various skills like JAVA/Python/.Net, J2EE, Spring MVC/Spring Core/ Web Services (SOAP/REST), Angular/JavaScript, SQL/PLSQL and HTML.
Experience in application software development using Java and knowledge of Java frameworks is required.
Will need to analyze and design databases interacting with Java software applications.
education: Master’s or equivalent in Science, Engineering, Information Systems/Technology, Business Administration or related field with 1 year of experience in job offered or related occupation is required.
Travel and/or relocation to unanticipated client sites throughout the USA is required.

title: Business Analyst
description: Nortek Consulting Inc. is looking for Business Analysts to analyze business processes, gather requirements, and improve operational efficiency.
duties: Collect and analyze business requirements and translate them into functional specifications.
Perform process analysis and suggest improvements.
Work closely with stakeholders and development teams to implement solutions.
Create reports, dashboards, and document business processes.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, or related field.
1-2 years of experience in business analysis or related role.

title: Software Engineer
location: Irving, Texas, USA and remote locations
description: We are hiring Frontend Developers to build responsive and interactive web applications using modern frameworks.
duties: Develop user-facing features using React, Angular, or Vue.js.
Optimize applications for speed and scalability.
Collaborate with backend developers and UI/UX designers.
Maintain code quality and perform code reviews.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.
Experience with JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and modern frontend frameworks.

title: RPA Solution Architect
description: We are seeking RPA Solution Architects to design and implement automation solutions for clients.
duties: Design and implement RPA solutions using tools like UiPath, Automation Anywhere, or Blue Prism.
Analyze business processes to identify automation opportunities.
Collaborate with business stakeholders to ensure alignment.
Provide guidance and mentorship to RPA developers.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
3+ years of experience in RPA development and architecture.

title: Software Developer
description: Looking for Data Analysts to interpret complex datasets, generate insights, and support data-driven decision making.
duties: Collect, clean, and analyze large datasets.
Collaborate with stakeholders to identify data requirements.
Provide actionable insights based on data analysis.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or related field.
1-2 years of experience in data analysis or business intelligence.

title: Project Manager
description: Manage end-to-end software development projects.
education: Bachelor’s degree or MBA.
5+ years of project management experience.

description: Ensure software quality through testing processes.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.
1-3 years of QA experience.

description: Automate deployments and manage cloud infrastructure.
education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.
